text:
py-gpx is a python  module for parsing GPS Exchange
Format (GPX) files.This module allows you to parse
and extract data from GPX files.About GPX format you
could visit http://www.topografix.com/gpx.asp.

WWW: http://pypi.python.org/pypi/pygpx/
